_comentario: 🎧 TOURS - Edita aquí la información de cada tour
pageSubtitle: Walk through history with GPS-guided audio tours powered by VoiceMap
pageSubtitle_es: Camina a través de la historia con tours de audio guiados por GPS impulsados por VoiceMap
pageSubtitle_pl: Przejdź przez historię dzięki wycieczkom audio prowadzonym przez GPS i zasilanym przez VoiceMap
pageSubtitle_de: Gehen Sie durch die Geschichte mit GPS-geführten Audiotouren von VoiceMap

tours.title: Voices of Resistance: Warsaw
tours.subtitle: The Political Axis and the Paradox of Power
tours.description: Discover how Warsaw served as both the administrative heart of the communist regime and the epicenter of resistance. From KOR to Solidarity, from the Flying University to Radio Solidarność.
tours.description_es: Descubre cómo Varsovia funcionó tanto como el corazón administrativo del régimen comunista como el epicentro de la resistencia. Desde el KOR hasta Solidaridad.
tours.description_pl: Odkryj, jak Warszawa służyła zarówno jako administracyjne serce reżimu komunistycznego, jak i epicentrum oporu. Od KOR po Solidarność.
tours.description_de: Entdecken Sie, wie Warschau sowohl als administratives Herz des kommunistischen Regimes als auch als Epizentrum des Widerstands fungierte. Von KOR bis Solidarność.

tours.title: Buildings With Heart: Warsaw
tours.subtitle: Architecture That Rose from Ashes
tours.subtitle_es: La Arquitectura que Resurgió de las Cenizas
tours.description: Explore Warsaw's architectural rebirth. From the meticulously reconstructed Old Town to the imposing Palace of Culture, discover how buildings tell the story of a city that refused to die.
tours.description_es: Explora el renacer arquitectónico de Varsovia. Desde su casco antiguo...

tours.title: Voices of Resistance: Krakow
tours.subtitle: The Fortress of the Spirit against the Regime
tours.description: Discover how Krakow acted as the spiritual lung of Poland between 1945 and 1989. From the cross that challenged concrete in Nowa Huta to the student movements and intellectual resistance.
tours.description_es: Descubre cómo Cracovia actuó como el pulmón espiritual de Polonia entre 1945 y 1989. Desde la cruz que desafió al hormigón en Nowa Huta hasta los movimientos estudiantiles.
tours.description_pl: Odkryj, jak Kraków działał jako duchowe płuco Polski w latach 1945-1989. Od krzyża, który rzucił wyzwanie betonowi w Nowej Hucie, po ruchy studenckie.
tours.description_de: Entdecken Sie, wie Krakau zwischen 1945 und 1989 als geistige Lunge Polens fungierte. Vom Kreuz, das dem Beton in Nowa Huta trotzte, bis zu den Studentenbewegungen.

tours.title: Buildings With Heart: Krakow
tours.subtitle: Architecture and Unbroken Spirit
tours.description: Look up and admire Krakow's architectural strength. From centuries-old churches that served as spiritual refuge to structures symbolizing resilience.
tours.description_es: Levanta la vista y admira la fuerza de Cracovia. Iglesias centenarias...

tours.title: Voices of Resistance: Wroclaw
tours.subtitle: The Smile That Disarmed the System
tours.subtitle_es: La Sonrisa que Desarmó el Sistema
tours.description: Explore how Wrocław chose subversive laughter and radical struggle to resist the regime. From the Orange Alternative's gnome revolution to Fighting Solidarity's underground networks.
tours.description_es: Explora cómo Wrocław optó por las sonrisas y las huelgas radicales...

tours.title: Buildings With Heart: Wroclaw
tours.subtitle: Where Water Shapes History
tours.subtitle_es: Donde el Agua da forma a la Historia
tours.description: Discover Wrocław's remarkable architecture across its islands and bridges. From Gothic churches to the stunning Centennial Hall, every building whispers stories of transformation.
tours.description_es: Descubre la increíble arquitectura que cruza puentes e islas...

tours.title: Voices of Resistance: Poznan
tours.subtitle: The Silenced Scream That Awakened a Nation
tours.description: Discover the city where the first major anti-communist uprising erupted in 1956. Poznań's workers dared to challenge the regime before anyone else.
highlights: Monument to the Victims of June 1956

tours.title: Buildings With Heart: Poznan
tours.subtitle: Where Trade Meets Resistance
tours.description: Explore Poznań's architectural heritage from its medieval origins to its role in modern Polish identity. The buildings of Stary Rynek tell centuries of stories.

tours.title: Voices of Resistance: Katowice
tours.subtitle: The Industrial Heart of Dissent
tours.description: Walk through the industrial landscapes of Upper Silesia where coal miners and steelworkers formed the backbone of resistance against the communist regime.

tours.title: Buildings With Heart: Katowice
tours.subtitle: From Coal to Culture
tours.description: Discover how Katowice transformed its industrial heritage into cultural landmarks. From the iconic Spodek to the modernist Nikiszowiec, architecture tells the story of Silesian identity.

tours.title: Voices of Resistance: Gdańsk
tours.subtitle: Where Solidarity Was Born
tours.description: Walk the streets where the Solidarity movement began. From the Gdańsk Shipyard gates to the European Solidarity Centre, experience the birth of freedom.

tours.title: Buildings With Heart: Gdańsk
tours.subtitle: The Hanseatic Spirit Lives On
tours.description: Explore Gdańsk's stunning Hanseatic architecture, from the medieval Long Market to the meticulously rebuilt Old Town. Every façade tells a story of trade, war, and rebirth.

tours.title: Voices of Resistance: Zielona Góra
tours.subtitle: Resistance in No Man's Land
tours.description: Explore how resistance in the Recovered Territories took a unique form, marked by the struggle of a society that first had to learn how to be a community before it could challenge the State.

tours.title: Buildings With Heart: Zielona Góra
tours.subtitle: Where Bricks Remember
tours.description: Discover Zielona Góra's architectural treasures, from the half-timbered Church of Our Lady of Częstochowa to the scarred but surviving St. Hedwig's Co-Cathedral.
highlights: Church of Our Lady of Częstochowa
